parameters:
...The maid's indecent voice echoes all the way to the hallway. Just hearing her cry
out like an animal without any restraint makes it clear...this is the daily life of
this mansion.
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
...... I'm on duty, don't talk to me.
ボイス再生(フェードイン・BGM調整可)
完了までウェイト = false

...I can hear Elly's voice coming from deep inside this room...and she's screaming
really loudly! Could it be that bastard is using violence on Elly...!?

If that's the case, it's terrible...! I have to rescue her before it's too late! Wait
for me, Elly─────

...Oh my, are you an acquaintance of the young lady the young master brought? If so,
please wait here. We have a room prepared for someone like you.

W-wait...!? No, I came here to save Elly...! I can't just wait while Elly is
suffering up ahead!

...In that case, if you come this way, you'll understand. Whether the young lady
truly needs your help... You'll see at a glance how the young master treats women.
Tch...! What do you mean by that...!?

...Before I break down the door and make an enemy of him, maybe I should listen to
what he has to say first...? Ugh...wait for me, Elly........
